task: Design a 3-week study plan for a student who has 2 hours on weekdays, 4 hours on weekends, and needs to prepare for math and programming exams.
why_metaplanning_relevant: Requires strategy selection, time allocation, and balancing multiple constraints.
notes: Good starter task for staged planning.

task: Propose a step-by-step approach for choosing between two internship offers when salary, learning potential, commute time, and future career goals all matter.
why_metaplanning_relevant: Involves comparing criteria, structuring trade-offs, and justifying a final recommendation.
notes: Useful for evaluating explicit planning quality.

task: Create a weekend trip plan for three friends with a limited budget, one person who dislikes museums, and a requirement to include one outdoor activity and one shared meal.
why_metaplanning_relevant: Needs decomposition, constraint tracking, and a coherent final plan.
